text:
of a case varies. There are single-person cases (mostly aged and blind/disabled) and 
multi-person cases (mostly TANF) in which all members of the case have the same case number, but a 
unique MSIS identification number. A warning for longitudinal research efforts: a person’s case 
number may change over time. 
SHORT NAME: MSIS_CASE_NUM 
LONG NAME: MSIS_CASE_NUM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
32 
FILE(S): 
Annual DE base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 
VALUES: 
Alphanumeric
